name: openEuler Kernel SIG Repository List
description: openEuler Kernel SIG maintains 21 repositories in the Operating System Kernel domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Kernel SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for openEuler Kernel SIG. The SIG has 118 core members and maintains 21 repositories in the Operating System Kernel domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Kernel SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Kernel SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at kernel@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Kernel SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Kernel SIG maintains 21 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Kernel.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Kernel SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Kernel SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Xie XiuQi, Hanjun Guo, Zheng Zengkai. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
